data.title: Dow reports first quarter 2026 results
data.description: In Midland, Michigan, on April 23, 2026, Dow (NYSE: DOW) reported financial highlights. Net sales amounted to $9.8 billion, marking a 6% decrease compared to the previous year. This decline was primarily due to stagnant sales in Performance Materials & Coatings and reductions in the remaining operating segments. The volume also saw a 2% decrease year-over-year, with the decrease attributed to...

data.title: VIZSLA SILVER AWARDS EPCM AND MINE DESIGN CONTRACTS FOR THE DEVELOPMENT OF THE PANUCO SILVER-GOLD PROJECT
data.description: Vancouver-based Vizsla Silver Corp. (NYSE: VZLA, TSX: VZLA) revealed on April 23, 2026 that it has chosen M3 for its Engineering, Procurement, and Construction Management (EPCM) contract. The company, listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under 0G3, made this significant announcement indicating a strategic move for its operations.

data.title: PG&E Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results; On Track to Deliver Solid 2026; Bundled Residential Electric Rates Now Down 23% since 2024 for Most Vulnerable Customers
data.description: In Oakland, California, on April 23, 2026, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) is reporting positive financial performance for the year. In the first quarter of 2026, the company saw a significant increase in GAAP earnings, reaching $0.39 per share, compared to $0.28 per share during the same period in 2025. This steady progress indicates a promising year ahead for PG&E Corporation in terms of financial growth.

data.title: Dutch Green Chemtech Startup Affix Labs Raises €1 Million for European Expansion of Sustainable Insect Repellent
data.description: A recent funding round, spearheaded by VP Capital and Oost NL, has injected significant capital into the expansion of Affix Labs Group's main product Repeltec and its patented water-based solubility technology. The funding will support the company's growth as EU regulations on pesticides become stricter. The initiative, based in NIJMEGEN, Netherlands, took place on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Simply Business Launches Insurance App for Small Businesses in ChatGPT in the U.S.
data.description: Local entrepreneurs are now able to access quick insurance quotes through ChatGPT technology. Today, Simply Business, a platform catering to small businesses, unveiled its business insurance app on ChatGPT in the U.S. This allows users to swiftly obtain estimated insurance prices.

data.title: HONEYWELL REPORTS FIRST QUARTER RESULTS AND REAFFIRMS 2026 OUTLOOK; ANNOUNCES SALE OF WAREHOUSE AND WORKFLOW SOLUTIONS
data.description: A recent report indicates a significant increase in orders by 7%, resulting in a backlog of approximately $38 billion. Sales have reached $9.1 billion, with reported and organic sales showing a growth of 2%. The operating margin stands at 16.1%, with a segment margin of 23.3%. Earnings per share (EPS) have fallen by 35% to $1.29, while adjusted EPS has increased by 11% to $2.45. There are plans for a spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace scheduled for the third quarter.

data.title: Monroe Capital Supports Growth of Royal Interpack Group
data.description: In Chicago, Monroe Capital LLC led the funding of a senior credit facility to aid the growth of Royal Interpack Group (RPG), a Riverside-based sustainable RPET packaging manufacturer established in 2011. Serving as the sole arranger and administrative agent, Monroe facilitated this financing arrangement. RPG specializes in integrated recycling, extrusion, and thermoforming services and is a key supplier to renowned brands in fresh produce and food service industries. This support aims to fuel RPG's expansion efforts and enhance its market presence.

data.title: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. to Meet with Investors at the 2026 BMO Farm to Market Conference
data.description: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. will be participating in the 2026 BMO Farm to Market Conference in Coral Gables, Florida. This event will offer the company the opportunity to meet with investors and showcase its operations and financial performance. Investors will have the chance to engage with Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. representatives to discuss its strategies and future prospects. This conference is significant for the company as it aims to attract potential investors and stakeholders.

data.title: RD Technologies' OristaPay Partners with TON and BytePlus to Launch the First Telegram AI Payment Gateway, Accelerating the Next-Generation Corporate Account Ecosystem for the Web3+AI Era
data.description: OristaPay, a brand under RD Technologies, unveiled its vision of becoming the leading corporate account for the Web3+AI era in Hong Kong on April 23, 2026. The announcement was made during the "TON AI Builders Day & Telegram AI Ecosystem Co-creation Summit" at the Hong Kong Web3 Festival. OristaPay aims to cater to the evolving needs of businesses in the digital landscape, showcasing its commitment to innovation and technological advancements. The event highlighted the company's strategic direction in embracing the intersection of Web3 and AI technologies to drive growth and efficiency.

data.title: Resolutions adopted by the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of Aktsiaselts Tallinna Vesi on 23 April 2026
data.description: The Management Board of Aktsiaselts Tallinna Vesi has called for the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders to be held, presenting a series of resolutions for shareholder consideration. The notice for the meeting was circulated on 31 March 2026 through the stock exchange information system, the company's website, and the publication Postimees.

data.title: Publishing of Suominen’s Interim Report January–March 2026 on May 7, 2026
data.description: On Thursday, May 7, 2026, at around 9:30 a.m. (EEST), Suominen Corporation is set to release its Interim report covering the period from January 1 to March 31, 2026.

data.title: Learn about the meaning of "fully backed" in stablecoins like USDT and USDC, key for traders to understand asset quality and standards.
data.description: Stablecoins are asserting to be "fully backed," with their asset quality, verification processes, and regulatory standards showing discrepancies. It is crucial for traders to be aware of these varying standards.

data.title: New NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell GPU and vGPU 20 boost AI workloads, offering hardware-level GPU partitioning for enterprises.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced the RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition along with vGPU 20 to cater to enterprise needs. These offerings provide hardware-level GPU partitioning and improved virtualized AI computing. The RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition and vGPU 20 aim to enhance the efficiency and performance of enterprise systems by enabling seamless GPU segmentation and advanced virtualized AI capabilities.

data.title: Banking association seeks 60-day delay on GENIUS Act rules for stablecoin, impacting U.S. implementation.
data.description: The American Bankers Association has formally asked for a 60-day extension to provide feedback on the regulations associated with the GENIUS Act. This request might lead to a delay in the rollout of stablecoins in the United States.

data.title: ABTC activates 11,298 mining rigs to reach 28.1 EH/s. Stock jumps 11.7% despite Q4 losses and tough market.
data.description: ABTC has successfully powered up 11,298 ASICs, which has resulted in a significant increase in total capacity reaching 28.1 EH/s. The company's shares have seen a notable surge of 11.7%, despite experiencing losses in the fourth quarter and facing tough market conditions.
